rationale: The cited paper directly examines prosocial goal pursuit around funding-goal progress in crowdfunding (Kickstarter), while the citing paper’s core question is how goal progress affects donations in charitable/crowdfunding settings (including Kiva) and explicitly says it extends prior goal-progress work. Given this strong construct/context overlap and a confirmed DOI-level match (10.1177/0022243718821697), the citation is plausibly substantive rather than a generic mention.
